project: Project SEKAI Tip Generation Summary Blocks
description: Canonical schema for per-chart summary and batch-level summary blocks used in the batch pipeline.

per_chart_summary_schema.description: Summary statistics for a single chart within a difficulty batch.

chart_id.description: Identifier of the chart inside the batch.

element_count.description: Number of mechanical elements detected in this chart.

element_frequency.description: Map from element name to count within this chart.

severity_distribution.description: Map from severity label to element count in this chart.

avg_score.description: Average dominance score over all elements in this chart.

avg_section_coverage.description: Average section_coverage over all elements in this chart.

max_score.description: Maximum dominance score among elements in this chart.

dominant_elements.description: Names of elements whose score equals max_score (within tolerance).

dominant_selected_flags.description: Map from dominant element name to boolean indicating whether it was selected into tips.

batch_summary_schema.description: Aggregated summary statistics for a full difficulty batch.

chart_count.description: Number of charts in this batch.

element_frequency.description: Map from element name to total count across all charts.

severity_distribution.description: Map from severity label to total element count across the batch.

avg_score.description: Average element score across all charts in the batch.

avg_section_coverage.description: Average section_coverage across all elements in the batch.

dominant_total.description: Total number of dominant elements across all charts.

dominant_selected_count.description: Number of dominant elements that were selected into tips.

charts_with_full_dominant_coverage.description: Count of charts where all dominant elements were selected into tips.

charts_with_zero_dominant_coverage.description: Count of charts where none of the dominant elements were selected into tips.
